profile.name: Parthkumar Patel
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.summary: MS Computer Science student at Stevens Institute of Technology with a 3.9 GPA and hands-on full-stack experience in React, TypeScript, REST APIs, and cloud deployment.

about.bio: Currently pursuing my MS in Computer Science at Stevens Institute of Technology with a 3.9 GPA, I bring practical experience in full-stack web development from internships at EventEase and TechBilv Solutions LLP. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies, with hands-on experience in REST API integration, AWS-based deployments, and responsive UI development. I enjoy solving complex problems with clean code and collaborating with teams to deliver reliable, user-focused products.

details: Focus on advanced computer science topics and research

bullets: Built and shipped two greenfield React SPAs and extended an existing codebase for charity golf live scoring and tournament operations, delivering responsive experiences from mobile layouts to 4K TV displays
Architected modular frontends with React 19, Vite, TypeScript/JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Redux Toolkit to support live leaderboards, dashboards, and admin workflows

Integrated REST API workflows with Axios for authentication, team onboarding, score submission, leaderboard retrieval, messaging, media uploads, and sponsor content with centralized error handling and toast-based user feedback
Implemented near real-time leaderboard updates via polling and optimized refresh logic for web and TV-ready views, including sponsor carousels and animated transitions
Delivered an admin/dashboard CMS with data-rich tables, CSV/XLSX import flows, and validated forms using React Hook Form, Zod, and TanStack Table
Collaborated in a Scrum-based remote team using Trello, Slack, Git/GitHub, and supported production builds, deployments, testing, and AI-assisted development workflows
Contributed to client-facing web applications using React.js, redesigning modals, enhancing layouts, and improving navigation elements
Integrated AI chatbot Hoori, updated link structures, and implemented alphabetical scrolling for streamlined user experience
Managed production deployments using Visual Studio 2022, publishing builds and updating projects on AWS-connected IIS hosting servers
Hosted and configured static websites on AWS S3, gaining hands-on experience with cloud hosting and deployment pipelines
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery and alignment with client requirements

projects.name: MRTD Validation System (ICAO TD3)
projects.description: Built a Python-based machine-readable travel document encoder, decoder, and validator using the Damm algorithm, with automated testing, coverage, mutation analysis, and performance benchmarking at production-scale record volumes.
highlights: Developed an end-to-end ICAO TD3 MRZ engine with scan, decode, encode, and check-digit validation.
Designed and executed 15 automated unit tests with a 100% pass rate.
Achieved 86% line coverage and generated full HTML/terminal reports.
Implemented mutation testing with 406 generated mutants and 137 killed mutants.
Benchmarked performance on up to 10,000 records at scale.

projects.name: Heart Disease Prediction System
projects.description: Medical prediction system using machine learning to predict heart disease presence in patients. Analyzed 1,889 patient records with 14 medical features, achieving 87.83% accuracy with Artificial Neural Network. Implemented and compared 3 ML algorithms (KNN, Random Forest, ANN) for MIS-637 Data Analytics course.
highlights: 87.83% accuracy with ANN model
Compared 3 ML algorithms (KNN, Random Forest, ANN)
90% recall for disease detection
Comprehensive data preprocessing pipeline

projects.name: Credit Score Prediction System
projects.description: Machine learning system that predicts credit scores (Poor, Standard, Good) for 100,000 customers using 6 ML algorithms. Achieved 81% accuracy with Random Forest after handling class imbalance using SMOTE. Performed comprehensive data cleaning, feature engineering, and model comparison for CS-513 Knowledge Discovery course.
highlights: 81% accuracy with Random Forest
Analyzed 100K customer records with 28 features
Handled imbalanced data using SMOTE
Compared 6 ML algorithms (KNN, Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, ANN)

projects.name: Financial QA Bot
projects.description: Python application that analyzes CSV financial data, answers natural-language questions with rule-based or OpenRouter-backed reasoning, and generates professional financial reports and visualizations.
highlights: CSV financial data ingestion and validation
Natural-language Q&A for revenue, income, expenses, and assets
Smart year detection for best/worst/highest/lowest questions
Rule-based fallback when AI is unavailable
Automated JSON report export
Fuzzy column matching and trend analysis

projects.name: SortBoard
projects.description: Built a responsive React + TypeScript sorting visualizer that animates 6 algorithms in real time using generator-based execution and user-controlled playback for interactive algorithm learning.
highlights: Real-time visualization for 6 sorting algorithms
Pause, resume, stop, and restart controls
Adjustable array size and animation speed
Color-coded bar states and algorithm complexity display
Responsive UI for desktop, tablet, and mobile

projects.name: MouseMacro
projects.description: Built a lightweight macOS menu bar automation app that remaps extra mouse buttons to copy/paste shortcuts with global event interception, suppressed default navigation behavior, and real-time usage analytics.
highlights: System-wide remapping of mouse Button 4 to Cmd+C and Button 5 to Cmd+V
Suppression of original Button 4/5 forward-back navigation events
Persistent menu bar presence with quick Preferences and Quit controls
Real-time session statistics for copy and paste actions
Accessibility permission flow with guided settings deep-link
Structured logging and resilient event-tap lifecycle management

projects.name: Mini Search Engine
projects.description: Python-based mini search engine that crawls and indexes HTML pages, ranks matches by term frequency, and serves results through a Flask web app and CLI.
highlights: Web crawler that downloads and stores HTML pages locally
Inverted index with stop-word removal and frequency-based ranking
Snippet previews and search-term highlighting in results
Flask web interface with a responsive layout and dark mode toggle
Recent search history and query logging to output.txt
Command-line search mode for terminal-based use

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A responsive, JSON-driven React portfolio that showcases professional experience, projects, skills, certifications, and resume content with a polished recruiter-friendly interface.
highlights: Sticky sidebar navigation with active section highlighting
Dark/light mode toggle and motion-based hero section
JSON-driven content for projects, skills, experience, and certifications
Live GitHub stats integration
Resume PDF preview and download
Contact form with toast confirmation
Scroll progress indicator and back-to-top control
SEO metadata management

projects.name: Online Shop E-commerce Website
projects.description: Functional e-commerce platform with intuitive UI and responsive design. Features MVC backend architecture with user authentication, product management, and shopping cart functionality using MongoDB for data persistence.
highlights: User authentication
Product management
Shopping cart functionality

projects.name: Basic Banking System
projects.description: Full-stack web application simulating core banking operations including customer account management, money transfers, and transaction history tracking. Built with PHP backend, MySQL database, and responsive frontend design. Features real-time balance updates and complete transaction logging.
highlights: Customer account management
Real-time money transfers
Transaction history logging
Responsive web design
Database-driven application

projects.name: Tic-Tac-Toe Game
projects.description: Interactive browser-based game with advanced JavaScript features including AI opponent, move history, and responsive design. Demonstrates mastery of DOM manipulation and event handling.
highlights: AI opponent algorithm
Move history tracking
Responsive UI

certifications.name: 100 Days Of Code - 2024 Web Development Bootcamp

extracurricular.name: Co-Founder/Event Head
extracurricular.summary: Coordinated logistics for 30+ events, including venue selection, scheduling, setup, and on-site operations. Collaborated with vendors, speakers, and participants to ensure seamless execution and issue resolution.

extracurricular.name: Core Team Member
extracurricular.summary: Key team member at GEC Gandhinagar, organizing Garba festivals, cultural events, day celebrations, and freshers' parties. Managed documentation, sponsorships, permissions, and coordination to ensure seamless events and attendee satisfaction.
